rulings.Case Title: BRAIN RESEARCH LABS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al VS. TOM CLARKE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft Joseph Rotenbberg To Recover Attorney'S Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $12048.08 As Prevailing Deft On "Anti-Slapp" Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16(C);
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 03, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANT JOSEPH ROTENBERG'S Motion To Recover Attorney's Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $12048.08 As Prevailing Defendant On "Anti-Slapp" Motion To Strike Pursuant To CCP 425.16(C) IS CONTINUED TO MAY 26, 2010 TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE WOOLARD. =(302/EHG)
